# Broken DOCX fixtures

Generated by `tmp/make-broken-fixtures.py`. Each file is a copy of a
canonical mammoth test-data DOCX with one intentional, well-defined
validation-breaking mutation. Used to exercise the TS validator.

| File                                     | Break                                                                                                                   |
| ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `single-paragraph.malformed-xml.docx`    | Truncated word/document.xml mid-tag — fails XML syntax check.                                                           |
| `tables.missing-namespace.docx`          | Removed xmlns:w from <w:document> root — namespace declaration missing.                                                 |
| `comments.unmatched-comment-marker.docx` | Injected unmatched <w:commentRangeStart w:id="999999"/> — comment-marker pairing check.                                 |
| `footnotes.duplicate-paraid.docx`        | Two paragraphs now share the same w14:paraId — duplicate-ID detection.                                                  |
| `endnotes.paraid-overflow.docx`          | First w14:paraId set to FFFFFFFF (>= 0x80000000) — ID-constraint check.                                                 |
| `tiny-picture.broken-rels.docx`          | Added relationship rIdGhost pointing at missing media/does-not-exist.png — broken-rels check.                           |
| `text-box.orphan-part.docx`              | Added word/orphan-part.xml with no entry in [Content_Types].xml — orphan-file check.                                    |
| `empty.missing-content-type.docx`        | Removed Content_Types entry covering word/document.xml — content-type-manifest check.                                   |
| `header-with-rid-no-sidecar.docx`        | Added word/header1.xml with r:embed reference but no word/\_rels/header1.xml.rels sidecar — rels-missing-sidecar check. |
